modules.sql: WITH target AS (SELECT CASE WHEN strftime('%w', MAX(a.ifw_effective_date)) = '6' THEN date(MAX(a.ifw_effective_date), '-1 day') WHEN strftime('%w', MAX(a.ifw_effective_date)) = '0' THEN date(MAX(a.ifw_effective_date), '-2 days') ELSE MAX(a.ifw_effective_date) END AS target_date FROM accounts a), active_accounts AS (SELECT DISTINCT t.account_id FROM transactions t, target td WHERE t.ifw_effective_date = td.target_date), customer_lookup AS (SELECT c.id AS customer_id, c.first_name, c.last_name FROM customers c INNER JOIN (SELECT id, MAX(ifw_effective_date) AS max_ifw_effective_date FROM customers GROUP BY id) latest ON c.id = latest.id AND c.ifw_effective_date = latest.max_ifw_effective_date) SELECT CAST(a.account_id AS INTEGER) AS account_id, CAST(a.customer_id AS INTEGER) AS customer_id, COALESCE(cl.first_name, '') AS first_name, COALESCE(cl.last_name, '') AS last_name, a.account_type, a.current_balance, td.target_date AS ifw_effective_date FROM accounts a CROSS JOIN target td LEFT JOIN active_accounts aa ON a.account_id = aa.account_id LEFT JOIN customer_lookup cl ON a.customer_id = cl.customer_id WHERE aa.account_id IS NULL
